data.title: Dr. Anirban Maitra is appointed as the new director of the Perlmutter Cancer Center at NYU Langone Health.
data.description: In January 28, 2026, NYU Langone Health revealed the selection of Dr. Anirban Maitra, a renowned physician-scientist recognized for his impactful contributions in pancreatic cancer research, as the new head of the Laura and Isaac Perlmutter Cancer Center. This appointment signifies a significant development in the field of cancer research and the treatment of pancreatic cancer.

data.title: Boyne Capital offers single-asset continuation fund for Pilot Energy, extending its partnership with the company.
data.description: In Miami on January 28, 2026, Boyne Capital, a private equity firm from Florida specializing in lower middle market company investments, finalized a single-asset secondary transaction. This transaction secures an extended partnership with Pilot Energy. No specific figures or further details were disclosed regarding the deal.

data.title: Clean Cult expands nationwide at Costco with launch of laundry detergent sheets, available in all US regions and on Costco.com. New York, Jan 28, 2026. #cleaningrevolution
data.description: Clean Cult has expanded its distribution to all Costco regions in the United States and is now available for purchase on Costco.com. With this move, Clean Cult is revolutionizing the laundry detergent market in major retail outlets. The announcement was made on January 28, 2026 in New York. Clean Cult, known for being the first company to introduce environmentally-friendly cleaning product packaging, continues to make waves in the industry.

data.title: Global Payment Orchestration Platform Market valued at US$1.7B in 2024, to reach US$6.1B by 2030, with a growth rate of 23.7%.
data.description: A report on the Payment Orchestration Platform Market has recently been added to the offering of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global market for Payment Orchestration Platform was valued at US$1.7 billion in 2024 and is estimated to reach US$6.1 billion by 2030. It is expected to grow at a CAGR of 23.7% from 2024 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and forecasts, aiding in making informed business decisions.

data.title: Avangrid renews partnership with Yale University for energy innovation, CEO pledges continued support at signing ceremony on January 27, 2026.
data.description: Avangrid, Inc., a prominent energy company part of the Iberdrola Group, has recently revealed the extension of its partnership with Yale University. The agreement was solidified during a signing event held at Yale's Campus on Tuesday, January 27, 2026. The CEO of Avangrid, Jose Antonio Miranda, participated in the ceremony and affirmed the company's ongoing backing for Yale's pioneering research endeavors that are propelling advancements toward a more intelligent energy landscape. This collaboration aims to explore groundbreaking opportunities by expanding the realms of innovation and achievable prospects in the energy sector.

data.title: FOX News Books to release "Nothing is Impossible with God" by anchor Shannon Bream on March 10th. #Faith #Inspiration
data.description: FOX News Books, the publishing arm of FOX News Media, is set to release a new book titled "Nothing is Impossible with God: Eleven Heroes. One God. Endless Lessons in Overcoming" on March 10th, 2026. The book is authored by the anchor of FOX News Sunday and New York Times bestselling author.

data.title: Hilco Global hires Henry Jackson to boost growth in its Capital Solutions and Professional Services divisions.
data.description: Northbrook, Illinois - On January 28, 2026, Hilco Global shared news of Henry Jackson's appointment at their New York City office. In his new role as Executive Director - Originations and Transactions, Mr. Jackson will contribute to expanding Hilco Global Capital.

data.title: AdCellerant introduces AI Media Planner tool on Ui.Marketing platform to streamline digital media planning.
data.description: On January 28, 2026, in Denver, a prominent digital advertising tech firm, AdCellerant, unveiled AI Media Planner on its Ui.Marketing platform. The tool aims to streamline a labor-intensive aspect of digital advertising. This launch is seen as a significant step forward for the company in revolutionizing digital advertising strategies.

data.title: Wonderskin launches new cleansing balm to melt makeup in seconds, promises to protect skin barrier. New York, Jan 28, 2026.
data.description: Introducing Wonderskin's first-ever beauty balm designed to defend your skin barrier and effortlessly dissolve stubborn makeup within moments. The innovative product debuted in New York on January 28, 2026, marking a significant step in skincare. This launch signifies the brand's commitment to providing effective cleansing solutions in line with its reputation for durable and viral makeup products.

data.title: Wall Street leaders from top firms discussed DeFi worries with SEC. Citadel, SIFMA, and JPMorgan met to address crypto agenda concerns.
data.description: On Tuesday, Citadel, SIFMA, and JPMorgan held discussions with the SEC to express concerns about the regulatory agency's strong focus on cryptocurrency. Key players in the finance sector emphasized worries about the SEC's proactive approach towards crypto-related matters.
